creator: m_josenhans@web.de
text:
Hipe-flag: 
----------
The standard virtual machine is still beam. Thus beam should remain the default implementation. While to have the option to run with hipe instead of beam would be much appreciated. (This is for example possible when using debian/ubuntu.)

Java-flag:
----------
Is used for Erlang-Java interface. But likely seldom needed. Not sure, if it harms when it is activated when not used.

WX-flag:
--------
In server environments without xorg-server it is not needed. But for debugging and monitoring purposes it is really needed, as Erlang community replaces the tk-GUI by WX-GUI.
E.g. the Erlang observer is therefore not working, which is the central monitoring tool. Test with:
observer:start().

The old application monitor Appmon has already been removed in Erlang 17. Test with appmon:start()

According to my understanding, activation of the WX-flag has the highest priority.
